raw.subject: Your Mobile page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I really enjoy the ranch photos you share on Facebook. Leah's Place has a unique, personal touch that sets it apart.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving potential customers with a harder time finding and booking appointments - especially considering how popular customized skin care and waxing services are.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea from what I've seen on your Facebook page, featuring a services menu, a work gallery, a prominent booking CTA, and your hours and location.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/leah-s-place-mobile

If you'd like to discuss how to bring your business online with a straightforward project, I'd be happy to provide more details via email or a quick call.

Let me know if you'd like to discuss further.
